name: Klops (Meat-egg Loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients except the hard-boiled eggs and margarine.
2. Place half the mixture into a well-greased loaf pan (oil the pan as needed).
3. Arrange the hard-boiled eggs in a row down the middle of the meat.
4. Cover with the remaining meat mixture.
5. Dab the top with margarine as desired: more if the meat is lean, less if it is fatty.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 500°F (260°C).
7. Reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for about 45 minutes until brown on top.
8. Serve warm or cold in thick slices so each piece has a center of egg.
